## Summary

Describe the change and the user or operator impact.

## Risk

- [ ] Changes contracts, funds, signatures or chain interactions
- [ ] Changes authentication, authorization or session handling
- [ ] Changes node isolation, networking or privileged host behavior
- [ ] Changes persistence, migrations or recovery behavior
- [ ] Changes public interfaces or deployment configuration

## Validation

List the exact checks run and relevant evidence.

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior
- [ ] Documentation reflects new behavior and limitations
- [ ] No credentials, user data, private paths or generated artifacts are included
- [ ] Commit carries a DCO signoff

## Rollback

Describe how to disable or reverse the change safely.
